script_text: The long A sound. Like in the word cake. The long sound says its name.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: The word cap has a short A sound.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: Watch this magic! Add an E to the end. Cap becomes cape. The E is silent, but it makes the A say its name.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.
